Title: Pietrangeli, Carlo
Overview: Scholar of the Roman renaissance and urbanist; editor of the Guide rionali di Roma. His Via del Corso, 1961 became a hallmark of urban historical study.
Sources: Julier, Insley. [finding aid for] Luigi Salerno research papers, 1948-1996. Getty Research Center. http://hdl.handle.net/10020/cifa2000m26.
